name: Adversarial Machine Learning: A Taxonomy and Terminology of Attacks and Mitigations
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: Adversarial Machine Learning: A Taxonomy and Terminology of Attacks and Mitigations. NIST publication NIST.AI.100-2e2023.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the public domain in the United States per Section 105 of the US Copyright Act.

current_extraction.notes: Structured the adversarial-ML taxonomy under Sections 2 (Predictive AI) and 3 (Generative AI) into ai-100-2-e2023-attacks.{csv,json}. 35 nodes total (20 predictive + 15 generative), 26 of which are leaf attack types. Schema: node_id, ai_type, depth, category_id, category_name, is_leaf, name, description. Section 4 (Discussion) is intentionally unstructured (prose commentary). Appendix glossary is intentionally unstructured here (handled in the separate glossary-extraction workstream).

notes: Auto-generated bulk metadata. Title/description from marker meta + README. Fields like Wikipedia URL, published date, and category-specific relations were not populated; enrich as needed.

extraction_history.notes: Extracted via marker (PDF -> markdown) before the SecID-mirror reorg. Structured CSV/JSON extraction is TODO for most NIST publications.
